rankings.title: Most AI Companies Won’t Survive (Tech Investor Explains)
summary_bullets: 90–95% of AI companies will fail.
Founders should consider exiting in 12–18 months.
Durable companies embed in workflows, use proprietary data.
Exit options include labs, vertical buyers, mergers.
Historical precedent: dotcom bust saw 90%+ failure.

rankings.title: The Many Benefits of Coca — The “Divine Leaf” with 8,000+ Years of Use
summary_bullets: Coca leaf is not cocaine; 8,000 years of use.
Medicinal benefits: altitude sickness, GI, metabolism.
War on drugs demonized coca due to racism.
Nutrient-rich, mild stimulant, no addiction.
Legalization could help farmers and reduce deforestation.

rankings.title: Cathy Lanier: My Story of Workplace Harassment As a Police Officer
summary_bullets: Early 1990s police force, few women.

Witnesses (all men) told the truth.
Case dismissed due to 90-day procedural delay.
Later rose to high rank after leadership change.
